name: AI-Powered Urban Air Quality Optimization & Community Health Advisory

parameters.subject: Community Air Quality Alert: {{$json.pollution.severity}} Level
parameters.text:
Hello Residents of {{$json.location}},

Current air quality is evaluated as {{$json.pollution.severity}} level with PM2.5 at {{$json.pollution.pm25}} µg/m³.

Alert: {{$json.alertMessage}}

Recommendations:
- {{$json.recommendations.join('\n- ')}}

Stay safe,
Urban Health Advisory Team
